overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path at night. The scene features moody blue-green lighting with stars visible in the sky, stone walls lining the path, and dense vegetation in the surrounding countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path alongside stone wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving past the stone wall on the right

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running parallel to the path on the right side
uneven dirt trail winding through the countryside
tall thin white-barked trees visible in the distance on the left
grassy fields extending into the darkness on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime rural trail with Geralt walking away from the camera. A stone wall runs along the right side of the dirt path while birch trees stand in the distance to the left. The environment is quiet and empty, with cool blue moonlight illuminating the scene.

events.description: stone wall ends and path continues through more open vegetation with bushes

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the stone wall disappears and the landscape opens up with denser shrubs on the right

entered.detail: dense leafy shrubs replacing the stone wall on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the stone wall ends, the trail opens into a wider grassy area with bushes lining the right side. The birch trees on the left grow closer as Geralt continues walking forward through the moonlit countryside, with distant forest visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime rural trail that gradually opens from a narrow path into a wider, moonlit countryside. It begins with Geralt walking away from the camera along a dirt path flanked by a stone wall on the right and distant birch trees on the left. As the stone wall ends, the trail expands into a broader grassy area where the path is now lined by bushes. The scene then shifts as the birch trees on the left draw closer, guiding the camera forward through the cool blue moonlight toward a distant forest.
